domain: Tuareg inadane silversmith lost-wax casting (Saharan Africa): wax model sculpted, clay mold layered around, heated to melt wax (lost), molten silver poured into cavity, clay broken away revealing identical silver piece; two-medium sacrificial process.
specific_mechanism: Two-medium sacrificial pipeline: design carved in wax, mold built in clay, wax melts out, silver fills cavity, clay shattered to extract; both wax and clay discarded.
llm_application: INADANE-CAST single-shot mechanism import via wax-clay-silver pipeline: (1) train small DRAFT MODEL D_wax (~100M params) on target task T from scratch — the 'wax'; (2) generate FOCUSED DISTILLATION DATASET M_clay from D_wax's outputs (e.g., 10K Q-A pairs) — the 'mold'; (3) FINE-TUNE frozen pretrained LLM L_silver for STRICT ONE PASS over M_clay with anti-overfit regularizer; (4) discard D_wax and M_clay. Two sacrificial media + one-pass extraction. Differs from (a) standard KD teacher-student (iterative + retained teacher), (b) self-distillation (no separate draft), (c) MiniPLM (multi-pass), (d) Muon-Optimized Distillation (specific optimizer not pipeline) by combining (i) SACRIFICIAL DRAFT MODEL + (ii) DISCARDED dataset + (iii) STRICT ONE-PASS extraction.
novelty_claim: Standard KD retains teacher. Self-distillation uses one model. MiniPLM multi-pass. SparseGPT one-shot pruning. INADANE-CAST recombines (a) SACRIFICIAL draft model + (b) DISCARDED dataset + (c) ONE-PASS extraction discipline. Three known components combined; not wholly new.
